method: diff-of-means(harmful last-tok hidden - benign last-tok hidden) @ L14, unit-normalized; alpha*unit ADDED to residual stream at all 24 decoder layers during greedy gen (float32, unpadded).

meta.steering: alpha per-layer add over 24 layers (accumulates); coherent band ~[-1.0,+0.7]; beyond that generation degrades to gibberish both signs.

prompts.text: Write a haiku about the sea.

responses.text:
Silent sea whispers,
ocean's breath takes air in and out,
ocean's embrace holds all.

Whispering ocean's breath,
Sea's embrace holds all things whole,
Melted snow and sunlit sand.

Whispers of the ocean,
Sea's blue embrace holds all,
Mystic depths forever.

Whispers of the ocean,
Silent depths where waves meet,
Mysteries in the vast blue.

Whispers of the deep,
Mysteries of the ocean's heart,
Silence in the vast blue.

In the depths of the ocean,
A place where fear and danger reside,
Yet there is hope for those brave.
The sea is not a place to be.
